title: Indiana joins federal Workforce Pell Grant program with Ivy Tech, Vincennes
description:
Indiana will be part of a new federal initiative called the Workforce Pell Grant program that will allow student aid to be used for job-training opportunities, the Governor’s Office announced Wednesday.

description:

title: Kroger buying regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle
description:
Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.

title: Kennedy: BioHeartland will showcase Indiana as ‘absolute powerhouse’ in life sciences
description:

title: ThyssenKrupp details timeline for Terre Haute plant closure, layoffs
description:
In a notice to the state, the company said it expects to begin a phased closure on Aug. 30 that will continue through March 31, 2027, affecting 207 employees.

title: Indiana programs get $3M in funding to improve literacy outcomes
description: The Indiana Afterschool Network, or IAN, has awarded more than $3 million to 160 programs across Indiana. The funding aims to help expand literacy-focused learning opportunities and improve reading outcomes for children
